<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/json-api.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-json-api-bash-213" location="lines:213-219" -->
```bash
   curl -X POST http://localhost:2975/v2/parties \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer $USER_ADMIN_TOKEN" \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -d '{
       "partyIdHint": "Alice"
     }'

```
